name: dining etiquette; tadzio
description:
“CHE FRETTA C'È?„

ೋღೋ

Beneath the overcast warnings of political decay in Europe, just before the blow of one of history's greatest wars—lied a summertime both mellow with a sense of disharmony and chastened joy. Whilst those from proud nations bordering with separation against one another avoid the conversations between other guests, the youth all share their common want to get the best of everything while they're off of their scholarly duties.

In the brooding end of the Victorian days, the Grand Hotel des Bains on the lido houses haunting stories that will always be kept hidden in its walls.

ೋღೋ

Sand rut hair, slender thoughts, he loves your attention. Because what is vacation without eccentricity?

T ; death in venice, björn andrésen, italy, venice, hotel, beautiful boy, novel

N ; ohhh boy. cholera did not attack the lido with this one! unless you want it to, dunno. i'd sit dying on a beach anyday
